subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The services at the Divine Threshold are many, but the greatest of services and the most perfect of rewards is the education of children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله خدمات آستان الهی بسیار ولی اعظم خدمات و اتم مثوبات تربیت اطفال و
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @education of children; moral education, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement
